title: user_authentication_flow
description: Test the user login and signup functionality using Supabase Auth, including social login options, session persistence, and middleware redirects to ensure secure authentication and no session loss on page refresh.

title: memory_creation_and_scheduling
description: Verify the creation, scheduling, and saving of digital memories or messages, including draft saving and user warnings during navigation to ensure messages are correctly stored and scheduled for future delivery.

title: digital_vault_storage_security
description: Test the secure storage and management of digital assets and sensitive legacy information in the digital vault, ensuring data privacy and access control.

title: subscription_plan_management_and_payment_processing
description: Validate the subscription plan selection, payment processing via Toss Payments, and immediate update of user plan status and database records.

title: online_memorial_space_management
description: Test the creation, management, and access control of public and private memorial spaces for users to remember loved ones.

title: recipient_verification_process
description: Verify the recipient identity verification workflow, including access control and confirmation before viewing messages.

title: landing_page_ui_and_content_display
description: Test the landing page for correct display of hero section, feature introductions, pricing overview, and responsiveness on mobile and tablet viewports.
